summary: Frontend-only regression test for mobile countdown overflow fix on /events/eb488c54-2ee9-4160-b851-548846ec1038. Verified countdown timer at 320px, 390px, 768px, and 1920px viewports. All acceptance criteria met.

mobile-320.sample_text: REGISTRATION CLOSES IN 48 DAYS : 06 HOURS : 36 MINS : 50 SECS

acceptance_criteria_verification: PASS: Countdown timer visible on 320px, no overflow, no horizontal scroll
PASS: Countdown timer visible on 390px (iPhone), properly sized (w=358 in 390 viewport)
PASS: Countdown timer visible on 1920px desktop (max-width 380 respected, centered)
PASS: All 4 boxes (Days, Hours, Mins, Secs) with numbers + labels visible on ALL viewports
PASS: No horizontal scrollbar on any tested viewport (docScrollWidth == docClientWidth)
critical_code_review_comments: EventDetailPage.jsx is 607 lines - approaching size limit; consider extracting sub-components (Countdown, GallerySlider, etc.) into separate files for maintainability.
Countdown Box uses `maxWidth: 72px` per box - at 320px viewport this yields ~288px total which fits well. Fix is solid.
clamp() font-size and gap sizing correctly handle the entire responsive range without media queries.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing event id eb488c54-2ee9-4160-b851-548846ec1038 (IDSEA National Conference 2026, countdown_date=2026-09-01, ~48 days from system date).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Countdown timer mobile overflow fix verified on all four required viewports (320, 390, 768, 1920). Countdown data-testid='countdown-timer' is rendered, visible, non-overflowing, and all 4 Days/Hours/Mins/Secs boxes with labels are present. Displayed text: 48 days remaining (matches expectation ~48d from system date Jul 15, 2026 to target Sep 1, 2026).
